title: Moderation update: spam and harassment handled
body: We reviewed the high-severity abuse queue and took action on validated violations. spam_wave_42 was banned for phishing spam across multiple channels. toxic_runner was banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. Reports tied to trusted_helper and core_maintainer were not sanctioned, and the core_maintainer report was treated as a false positive. Other lower-severity reports remain queued for later review.
